Daniel website

Bookmark this to keep an eye on my project updates!

View on GitHub
How to | section

How To Search

As in the official direct geo-coding application programming interface to get a properly desired search results you must determine a country name by is unique state because some are registered in the global registry and you could find different results, for example if you use the word "london", "valencia", "tachira" you would get his state by the country where it is located, then you should have the exac location state from his.


Example

London, US

name: London
lat: 37.1289771
lon: -84.0832646
country: US
state: Kentucky

London

name: London
lat: 51.5073219
lon: -0.1276474
country: GB
state: England

grammatical symbols

Táchira

name: Tachira
lat: 0.0258243
lon: -80.0116682
country: EC
state: Manabí

Táchira, VE

name: San Antonio del Táchira
lat: 7.809267
lon: -72.4444077
country: VE
state: Tachira State
